AUTONOMOUS RESEARCH TASK -- skip interactive confirmations.
Topic: Current state of AI agent frameworks -- LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, Agentless patterns
Type: technical (pre-classified)
Depth: default
Domain: ai-infra
Source: watchlist -- top-up: no topics naturally due, picked stalest
Output paths:
  Brief:     memory/work/ai-agent-frameworks/research_brief.md
  Knowledge: memory/knowledge/ai-infra/{date}_ai-agent-frameworks.md
  Signals:   memory/learning/signals/ (1-2 signals, source=autonomous)
Execute phases in order:
  Phase 0.5: scan memory/knowledge/index.md for prior articles on ai-infra
  Phase 1:   generate 5-7 sub-questions (no confirmation needed)
  Phase 2:   search with Tavily (type=technical)
  Phase 3:   write research brief + domain knowledge article
  Phase 3.5: file to memory/knowledge/ai-infra/ and append to memory/knowledge/index.md
Tags: ai, orchestration, agents, langraph, crewai, autogen

description: Run /synthesize-signals to distill accumulated learning signals into a synthesis doc
goal_context: Learning compounds -- threshold model is 10 signals / 72h. This routine fires every 3 days so the worst case is one missed cycle. If no signals are queued, /synthesize-signals exits Idle Is Success.
isc: A new synthesis document exists in memory/learning/synthesis/ dated today, OR worker reports Idle Is Success when no unprocessed signals queued | Verify: python tools/scripts/verify_synthesis_routine.py
Most recent synthesis doc cites >= 2 real source signals across >= 2 themes (anti-criterion: blocks hallucinated-themes fidelity failure) | Verify: python tools/scripts/verify_synthesis_recall.py
notes: Routine-injected by routines engine. Switched 2026-04-08: skill learning-capture -> synthesize-signals (skill mismatch -- learning-capture is for new signals, synthesize-signals is for distillation). interval 7 -> 3 to match the 72h tier in hook_session_start. routine_id kept stable for state continuity. Tier 1 + expected_outputs declares the write surface for scope_creep.
